nodes.label: Voice AI Calling SaaS Platform — Main Server  v2.1 (Production Hardened)  Change
Dependency: validates X-API-Key header on write endpoints.     If PLATFORM_API_K
Startup: initialize DB and migrate JSON files. Shutdown: nothing needed.
Uptime monitoring endpoint. UptimeRobot / BetterUptime hits this every 5 min.
Serve the AudioWorklet processor script (replaces deprecated ScriptProcessor).
Start a simulated demo campaign (AI generates human responses).     Dashboard up
Bridges browser mic audio (via WS binary messages) into the Pipecat pipeline.
Sends pipeline output back to the browser WebSocket.      Binary frames  → raw P
Simple browser mic → STT → LLM → TTS → browser speakers.     No dashboard events
Client speaks via browser mic. The AI pipeline runs normally.     ADDITIONALLY:
Resolve the agent schema path from agent_id.     Always reads from disk — never
